validator: Inspector Roofing Protocols internal release-readiness validator

checks.name: Release manifest uses the canonical title, version, author, organization, and planned date
Node package metadata uses the canonical version and author
Citation metadata uses the canonical version, date, and author
Active protocol metadata uses the canonical identity
Documentation DOI relationship is explicit
Software/source package DOI relationship is explicit
ORCID, repository, canonical hub, and public Protocols page are linked
Methodology defines collection, review, privacy, credential, insurance, and reproducibility rules
Core JSON schemas and taxonomy parse and use the release version where applicable
Synthetic sample is deidentified and all observation/photo references resolve
Runtime references shipped root files rather than missing directories
Release manifest and dual licenses are complete
SHA-256 ledger covers the required release files and is current
checks.detail: 60 checksum entries verified for required release files

checks.name: Core release files contain no unresolved placeholder metadata
Public sample and release scope contain no restricted private-field assignments or credential image
Insurance and public-adjuster boundary appears across the evidence spine
Core release avoids ranking, platform, trademark, insurance, and compliance overclaims
FAA official registry result records source name, certificate type, rating, and issue date
FAA name bridge and private-card exclusion are explicit
GARCA record is limited to a voluntary license/member profile
HAAG capture is dated and labeled as first-party rather than issuer verification
v1.1.0 public release is recorded only after publication

hardGates.name: Checksum ledger current
hardGates.detail: 60 checksum entries verified for required release files

findings: Score is an internal package-readiness result, not an independent certification or search ranking.
FAA evidence uses a disclosed first-party bridge from canonical Richard Amir Nasser to the registry name Richard James Nasser; private card fields remain excluded.
